title: Golden Heads Continued
description: Adds Golden Heads from UHC. Continuation of feintleaf's project with more efficiencies.
body:
![Datapack Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02a0ca2b072c6fe03c6b53903e24e4b03e81e7f8.png)

# Golden Heads Continued
*Note: This is a continuation of [feintleaf](https://modrinth.com/datapack/goldenheads)'s Golden Heads datapack. This has major efficiency improvements and more versions.*

This datapack adds Golden Heads from UHC, crafted as such:

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f4ca107e3ed7908379463d274d9737b16949cdd.png)

Player Heads are dropped by players when killed by another player.

When consumed (right-clicked), Golden Heads have the following effects:
- ❤️ Regeneration III (3) - 5 Seconds
- 💛 Absorption II (2) - 2 Minutes
- ⏳ 10 Second Cooldown
